query: I just generated deck.pptx from the HTML slides. Can you check if there are any layout problems? Some text might be running off the edges
run validation on output/presentation.pptx and tell me the quality score

how did the generated deck score against the quality rubric? any slides below 85?

create a contact sheet montage of all slides so I can get a quick overview

run the full end-to-end pipeline: standardize, convert, validate, render, compare

set the quality threshold to 90 for this project
the alpha blending is wrong on the card backgrounds — they should be slightly purple not black
